---
title: "Mary Ann Martin, Lady"
---

## Mary Ann Martin, Lady

**Dates:** (d. 2 Jan 1884)

**Maiden name:** (Parker)

### Description

friend of the Rt. Rev. [[person:1155]J. C. Patteson]

### Biography

She married (1840 or 41) Sir William Martin [Scholefield, <i>A Dictionary of New Zealand Biography</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 19th 1874
- Letter from December 30 [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
